pullRequest.title: QE-15398: fixing modelAPI and adding stop modelAPI version

nodes.body:
It is sufficient to start the first line on the line after `"""` but with the same indent.

```suggestion
        """
        #!/usr/bin/env python
        def main(**kwargs):
            return {"good": "stuff"}
```
Demo:
![image](https://github.com/cerebrotech/domino/assets/67887898/487a0d00-fbbc-433a-8e6d-5183f8b6b789)
```
(venv) albatross 545$ python /tmp/wrap.py
foo
        bar
        baz


foo
bar
baz
```

@ddl-mmahmoud could you check also this comment?
```
    # Can't separate the """ and the #! because then the shebang line won't be
    # the first line as is required.
```

I have concerns about your suggestion, that is why I did not separate `"""` and `#! `
Yeah if you have tested your adjustment to work I will drop these comments, apparently I got it wrong then and I am maybe getting it wrong again now.
Fixing this:
After stop model version call the correct status is `Ready to run` Never saw `Stopped`

Maybe this doesn't matter since it is just best-effort, but if the test fails, this line will not run.  To get this line to run even if the test fails, the test must appear in a `try/finally` block, and the `finally` branch should have the cleanup.  I.E.

```python
try:
    all_testing_goes_here()
finally:
    stop_model()
```

But most of the time the tests pass, so most of the time this cleanup will occur, and perhaps that is sufficient
